title.en: China-to-Timor-Leste Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入东帝汶：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入東帝汶：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Timor-Leste ANE and EDTL interconnection expectations, Ministry of Energy-linked project requirements, IEC 62109 safety baseline, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface, IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC and power quality, and 220/380 V 50 Hz grid context where matching with China, versus China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与东帝汶ANE、EDTL并网导向要求、能源主管机构项目要求、IEC 62109安全基线、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727电网接口、IEC 61000与IEC 62920 EMC及电能质量要求及220/380 V 50 Hz电网环境——对比中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與東帝汶ANE、EDTL併網導向要求、能源主管機構項目要求、IEC 62109安全基線、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727電網介面、IEC 61000與IEC 62920 EMC及電能品質要求及220/380 V 50 Hz電網環境——對比中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ANE conformity scope determination, EDTL grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design acceptance, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, EPC contractors, and installers should verify current Timor-Leste grid interconnection requirements, ANE technical requirements, IEC evidence expectations, and project-owner conditions with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ANE合格评定范围裁定、EDTL并网批准、机电安装设计验收、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方、EPC承包商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行东帝汶并网条件、ANE技术要求、IEC证据预期和项目业主条件。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ANE合格評定範圍裁定、EDTL併網批准、電機安裝設計驗收、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方、EPC承包商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行東帝汶併網條件、ANE技術要求、IEC證據預期及項目業主條件。

answer_first.en: For PV inverters exported from China to Timor-Leste, the practical gates are: (1) domestic ANE/EDTL interconnection review where project-specific scope documents reference ANE and utility interfaces; (2) IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 evidence for baseline inverter safety; (3) IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence; (4) IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality evidence; and (5) confirmation of project-specific protection, commissioning, and communication assumptions for 220/380 V 50 Hz operation. Timor-Leste and China are nominally aligned on 220/380 V 50 Hz. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 are useful engineering baselines, but they are not sufficient by themselves for Timor-Leste project acceptance.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口东帝汶的实际门槛包括：（1）在项目范围文件引用ANE与EDTL接口时，满足本地ANE/EDTL并网审查；（2）提供IEC 62109-1/IEC 62109-2安全基线证据；（3）提供IEC 62116防孤岛及IEC 61727公用电网接口证据；（4）提供IEC 62920和IEC 61000 EMC与电能质量证据；（5）对220/380 V 50 Hz运行场景下的项目专属保护、投运、通信假设进行确认。东帝汶与中国名义电压频率一致。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024可作工程参考，但不足以单独满足东帝汶项目验收。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口東帝汶的實際門檻包括：（1）在項目範圍文件引用ANE與EDTL介面時，滿足本地ANE/EDTL併網審查；（2）提供IEC 62109-1/IEC 62109-2安全基線證據；（3）提供IEC 62116防孤島及IEC 61727公用電網介面證據；（4）提供IEC 62920與IEC 61000 EMC及電能品質證據；（5）對220/380 V 50 Hz運行場景下的項目專屬保護、投運、通訊假設進行確認。東帝汶與中國名義電壓頻率一致。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004與GB/T 19964-2024可作工程參考，但不足以單獨滿足東帝汶項目驗收。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
